F

FACTOR - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLVideo
The Heiht / Width factor.
FALLBACK_INVALID - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.FallbackArticleType
The type for the invalid references fallback articles.
FALLBACK_NOTINCLUDED - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.FallbackArticleType
The type for the references which point to not included articles fallback articles.
FALLBACK_TITLE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"fallback": The name for fallback articles title.
FallbackArticleType - Interface in org.docgene.model
the enumeation for fallback articles types.
FALSE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.BorderType
The type with no border.
FIELD - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLIncludedAPIMember
Field members.
FileGenerationType - Interface in org.docgene.main
The file generation type.
FontFace - Interface in org.docgene.api
The named font faces enumeration.
fontFace - Variable in class org.docgene.api.SentenceStyle
The sentence font face.
FontNamedSizeType - Interface in org.docgene.model
The list of named sizes for Fonts.
FontSize - Interface in org.docgene.api
The named font sizes enumeration.
FontType - Interface in org.docgene.model
The font types.
FOR - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"for": The name for the "For ..., see" text.
forceAbsoluteLinks(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Set if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links (default is false).
FRENCH - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.globals.Locales
The French locale.
FROM - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"from": The name for the "from" text.
FULLTEXTSEARCH - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"searchResults": The name for accessing the Full Text Search page title.
